description: User hovers over March 13th in the departure date picker.
page_title: Flight Centre AU | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages
frame_description: The travel dates calendar modal is open over the Flight Centre homepage, showing February and March 2026.

description: User clicks on March 13th to select it as the departure date.
page_title: Flight Centre AU | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages
frame_description: The user selects March 13th in the calendar.

description: The date picker updates to highlight the selected departure date and prompts for a return date selection.
frame_description: The calendar UI updates, showing March 13th as selected and changing the prompt to 'Returning travel dates'.

description: User hovers over March 22nd in the return date picker.
page_title: Flight Centre AU | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages
frame_description: The cursor moves to and lingers over March 22nd in the calendar.

description: User clicks on March 22nd to select it as the return date.
page_title: Flight Centre AU | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages
frame_description: The user selects March 22nd as the return date.

description: The date picker updates to show the selected return date range.
frame_description: The calendar highlights the range between March 13th and March 22nd.

description: User hovers over the 'Done' button in the date picker modal.
page_title: Flight Centre AU | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages
frame_description: The cursor moves to the 'Done' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm date selection.
page_title: Flight Centre AU | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages
frame_description: The user clicks 'Done' to close the date picker.

description: The date picker modal closes, returning focus to the main search form.
frame_description: The modal disappears, revealing the homepage search bar with the selected dates populated.

description: User hovers over the 'Search flights' button.
page_title: Flight Centre AU | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages
frame_description: The cursor hovers over the blue 'Search flights' button in the header area.

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button to initiate the search.
page_title: Flight Centre AU | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Packages
frame_description: The user clicks the search button.

description: The page navigates to the search results. A loading screen is displayed while results are fetched.
frame_description: The browser navigates to a new URL and displays a loading screen.

description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a progress spinner.
frame_description: A full-screen loading animation is visible.

description: User scrolls down through the list of departing flight results.
frame_description: The search results page has loaded, and the user is scrolling through the available departing flights.

description: User hovers over a Virgin Australia flight departing at 6:10am.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over a specific flight result card.

description: User clicks on the flight card to view fare options.
frame_description: The user clicks the flight card.

description: The flight card expands to show different fare types: Lite, Choice, and Flex.
frame_description: The UI expands to reveal three fare columns with details and select buttons.

description: User hovers over the 'Select' button for the 'Lite' fare option.
frame_description: The cursor hovers over the 'Select' button for the cheapest fare option.

description: User clicks 'Select' for the Lite fare.
frame_description: The user selects the Lite fare.

description: A 'Good choice!' confirmation overlay appears briefly before transitioning to return flight selection.
frame_description: A modal overlay with a checkmark and 'Good choice!' message appears.

description: The UI updates to display the 'Select Return Flight' section.
frame_description: The page content refreshes to show return flight options from Melbourne to Adelaide.

description: User scrolls through the return flight options.
frame_description: The user is browsing the list of return flights.

description: User hovers over a Virgin Australia return flight departing at 11:00am.
frame_description: The cursor hovers over a return flight option.

description: User clicks on the return flight card.
frame_description: The user clicks to expand the return flight details.

description: The return flight card expands to show fare options. User hovers over different fare details.
frame_description: The return flight fare options are displayed, and the user examines the details before the segment ends.
